name: cpig-63-shepard-blend
description: 63 Shepard Blend Field (R6.5 Phase E Batch 1 — Blending)

setup.vlmDescription: A light-blue organic capsule shape stretched horizontally between two positions, rounder on the left side and flatter on the right, filling most of the viewport.
setup.whatItDoes: Shepard-weighted blend of N fields. Each field has a corresponding weight field (use Field Constant to model a scalar weight). Formula: f_blend = Σ wᵢ·fᵢ / max(Σ wᵢ, ε). Use it for region-based TPMS blending where each region contribution is weighted. The denominator normalizes so the weights do not need to sum to 1.
setup.whatYouShouldSee: A light-blue blob bridging two separated primitives. With a sphere at -6,0,0 (weight 1.0) and a box at +6,0,0 (weight 0.5), the blend is a smooth organic capsule stretched along X — the sphere side is rounder, the box side is flatter. Distinguish from Sigmoid Blend by the absence of a guide-field-gated transition band.
